message:
test(bd-3w50): cover error/complex tools, builder derives, and required tracking

Add 8 tests to testing/fixtures/tools.rs: error_tool fields,
complex_schema_tool fields, greeting/calculator annotation details,
ToolBuilder version/tags/output_schema, Debug/Clone, required params
tracking, and all_sample_tools count (9 → 17 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
